home.memberQuest.completeBody: Uthole {{coins}} Amakhrediti no-{{xp}} XP. Wamukelekile ku-Zobia!
home.memberQuest.reward: 🏆 Qeda zonke izinyathelo ukuthola {{coins}} Amakhrediti + {{xp}} XP!

profile.joinGuildHint: Thola izinzuzo ze-XP futhi unqobe ezimpini
settings.deleteAccountHint: Le ntokhu iyaphakade futhi ayibuye ibuye. Wonke amadatha akho azosuswa.
settings.pinDescription: I-PIN yezinombolo ezine enezinzuzo ezengeziwe ekuvikeleni izinkokhelo nezicelo zokukhipha.
settings.twoFactorDisabledHint: Engeza izinga elengeziwe lokuphepha ku-akhawunti yakho.
settings.disable2faHint: Faka ikhodi yamanje yezinombolo eziyisithupha kusuka ku-app yakho yokufakazela ukuqinisekisa.
settings.chatThemeHint: Lungisa itheme lebala lamabhamuzi omilayezo wakho. Izitheme ezingeyizo ezejwayelekile zidinga uhlelo lwe-Pro noma lwe-Max.
settings.billingHint: Phatha uhlelo lwakho, isikhathi sokukhokhela, nezinto zokukhokhela.
settings.exportDataHint: Layisha ikhophi yephrofayili yakho, imilayezo, nomlando womsebenzi.
settings.privacyDmOptOutDesc: Thintela labo abangebona abangane ukuthumela i-DM
guild.joinSubtitle: Amaqembu aseduze nawe — nqoba ezimpini unyuke izinga
leaderboards.title: Ohlwi Lwezinga
leaderboards.track.creator: Umdali
wallet.title: Isikhwama
wallet.purchaseInitiated: Ukuthenga kuqalisiwe — hlola i-imeyili yakho ukuqinisekisa.
quests.title: Imisebenzi Yansuku Zonke
quests.subtitle: Qeda imisebenzi ukuthola i-XP nezinhlamvu
quests.bonusUnlocked: Yonke imisebenzi iqediwe — i-XP yebhonasi inikezwe!
seasons.title: Izikhathi
seasons.noActiveSeason: Akukho sikhathi esisebenzayo manje. Buyela emuva!
seasons.giftConfirm: Nika ipassi ku-@{{username}}? Lokhu kuyabiza amakhrediti ezingu-{{price}}.
prestige.title: Isidumiso
prestige.honourMessage: Uqale kabusha — ngesidumiso. Ilifa lakho liyakhula.
prestige.confirmMessage: Ungumuntu we-{{rank}}. Ufuna Isidumiso futhi uqale kabusha — ngesidumiso?
nemesis.title: Isitha Sakho
nemesis.subtitle: Iqhawe elifaniswe nezinga lakho le-XP. Lihluze ukuze ukhuphuke.
nemesis.noNemesisDesc: Qhubeka uzuze i-XP — isitha sizonikezwa ngoMgqibelo uma kuba nesifanele.
nemesis.rule1: Ifaniswa njalo ngeviki nomuntu phakathi kuka-10% we-XP yakho
nemesis.rule2: Idolobha elifanayo likhethwa, akukho bangane abaxhumekile
nemesis.rule3: Umjaho uqapha i-XP ezuzwe kusukela umdlalo uqalile
nemesis.rule4: Dlula isitha sakho ukuzuza i-XP Yomlando Yebhonasi
rooms.create.title: Dala Ikamelo
rooms.create.graduationDesc: Bamba isikhathi sokugcina sabafundi. Izitifiketi Zokufunda Zika-Zobia zizonikwa ngemva kokuliqedela.
room.creator: Umdali
room.tippingBanner: Ikamelo Lethiphu — bonisa ukusekela kwakho ngezipho!
room.replayFee: Ukudlala kabusha kudinga inkokhelo yesikhathi esisodwa ye-{{fee}} amakhrediti
room.noReplayAvailable: Akukho ukudlala kabusha okutholakalayo kule drop.
room.spectacleThresholdDesc: Izipho ezilingene noma ezidlula le nani zizoqalisa umbukiso omkhulu kulo kamelo lonke. Shiya inkundla ukusetshenziswa kwenani ngayinye yesipho.
creator.title: Idashbhodi Yomdali
creator.broadcasts.title: Ukusakaza Komakhi
creator.broadcasts.noFreeLeft: Akukho ukusakaza kwamahhala okuseleyo le nyanga. Ukusakaza okongeziwe kubiza {{amount}} 🪙 ngakunye.
creator.broadcasts.historyEmpty: Akukho ukusakaza okuthunyiwe. Thumela ukusakaza kwakho kokuqala kubalandeli bakho!
creator.broadcasts.errorBodyTooLong: Umlayezo kumele ube namagama ayi-1000 noma ngaphasi
creator.broadcasts.accessDeniedDesc: Kudingeka ube umakhi we-Rising tier noma ngaphezulu ukuze uthumele ukusakaza.
notifications.title: Izaziso
referrals.title: Izincomo
referrals.linkCard.title: Isixhumanisi Sakho Sencomo
referrals.linkCard.hint: Yabelana nalesi sixhumanisi ukuzuza imiklomelo lapho abangane bejoyina baphinde baqedele isenzo sabo sokuqala.
referrals.explainer.title: Ukusebenza Kohlelo Lwamaqophelo Amabili
referrals.explainer.tier1Body: Lapho umuntu ejoyina esebenzisa isixhumanisi sakho sencomo futhi eqedela isenzo sabo sokuqala esifanelekayo, uzuza i-XP nezinhlamvu.
referrals.explainer.tier2Body: Lapho izincomo zakho zeqophelo 1 zincomela abanye, uzuza ibhonasi encane kusukela kulabo abajoyina ngeqophelo 2 futhi.
referrals.table.title: Abasebenzisi Ababenconywayo
referrals.table.empty: Abekho abasebenzisi ababenconywayo okwamanje. Yabelana nesixhumanisi sakho ukuqala!
elder.title: Uhlelo Lwebadala
elder.dashboard.noMentees: Abekho abafundi okwamanje. Yabelana nesixhumanisi sakho somqeqeshi ukuheha abafundi.
elder.eligibility.title: Yiba Umuntu Omdala
elder.eligibility.body: Abantu abadala yilabo abanolwazi abaholela abadlali abasha. Ufaneleke ukufaka isicelo!
elder.nonEligible.title: Uhlelo Lwebadala
elder.nonEligible.body: Abantu abadala yilabo abalolwazi lwase-Zobia abaholela abadlali abasha. Njengoba ukhula, ungafaneleka ukuba ngumuntu omdala nawe.
elder.nonEligible.wantMentorBody: Cela umqeqeshi omdala ukuholelwa endleleni yakho ku-Zobia.
elder.nonEligible.requestSent: Isicelo sithunyiwe! Umuntu omdala uzonikezwa ngokushesha.
council.title: Ibhunga Leqonga
council.subtitle: Amalungu akhethiwe aholela isigqi seqonga ngeziphakamiso ezivotelwe.
council.noIdeasHint: Amalungu ebhunga angafaka imibono yeqonga lapha.
stickers.title: Isitolo Sezitembu
stickers.subtitle: Vula amaphakethe ezitembu ukuwasebenzisa emilayezweni nasemakamelo
moments.title: Amathuba
moments.subtitle: Izividiyo ezimfushane nezithombe zomphakathi
moments.create.title: Yabelana Ngethuba
moments.create.caption: Umqolobane
publicProfile.creator: Umdali
subscription.title: Ukubhalisa Nokukhokhela
subscription.billingHint: Ukukhokhela ngonyaka kukunika izinyanga ezimbili zamahhala (khokha ezi-10, thola ezi-12).
subscription.cancelConfirm: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukukhansela ukubhalisa kwakho? Uzogcina uhlelo lwakho kuze kufike ekupheleni kwesikhathi sokukhokhela.
subscription.cancelledSuccess: Ukubhalisa kukhanselwe. Uzogcina ukufinyelela kuze kufike ekupheleni kwesikhathi.
subscription.finePrint: Amanani angama-Nigerian Naira (NGN). Ukubhalisa kuvuselelwa ngokwenzeka ngokwayo futhi kungakhanselelwa nganoma iyiphi isikhathi. Izinhlelo zonyaka zikhokhelwa njengokukhokhela okukodwa.
groups.title: Izingxoxo Zamaqembu
groups.noGroupsHint: Dala iqembu ukuxoxa nabantu abaningi ngesikhathi esisodwa
groups.create.title: Ingxoxo Entsha Yeqembu
groups.create.noFriends: Engeza abangane kuqala ngaphambi kokudala iqembu.
events.title: Imicimbi
events.noEventsHint: Buyela emuva maduze ukuze ubone imicimbi nezimpahla ezizayo!
events.giftDrop.title: Isipho Senyanga Yonke
inbox.title: Ibhokisi Lemeyili
inbox.noMessagesHint: Awunayo imilayezo evela ku-Zobia okwamanje. Buyela emuva maduze!
communityNotes.title: Amanothi Omphakathi
communityNotes.subtitle: Umongo ovela kumphakathi mayelana nezinhloko ezibikelwe. Noma ubani angafinyelela amanothi asiza.
communityNotes.noNotesHint: Yiba owokuqala ukuengeza umongo osizayo ezinhlokweni ezibikelwe.
communityNotes.modal.title: Engeza Inothi Lomphakathi
communityNotes.modal.subtitle: Engeza umongo osizayo ezinhlokweni ezibikelwe. Amanothi kufanele abe yiqiniso futhi akhele.
communityNotes.modal.placeholder: Nika umongo noma incazelo mayelana nalesi sinhloko…
communityNotes.modal.minLength: Inothi kufanele libe nezinhlamvu ezingama-20 okungenani.
terms.title: Imigomo Yesevisi
privacy.title: Inqubomgomo Yobumfihlo
notFound.title: Ikhasi Alitholakali
notFound.description: Ikhasi ofuna lona alikhona noma lihanjisiwe.
guildDiscovery.title: Amaqembu aseduzane nawe ayaqasha
guildDiscovery.subtitle: Ukujoyina iGuild kukuvumela uthole amaXP awengeziwe kukho konke okwenzayo.
guildDiscovery.error: Yehlulekile ukulayisha izincomo zeGuild. Hlola uxhumano lwakho.
guildDiscovery.empty: Awekho amaqembu eduzane nedolobha lakho okwamanje
guildDiscovery.emptyHint: Hlola maduze — noma bhekisisa wonke amaqembu.
guildDiscovery.tooNewBody: Izincomo zeGuild zivuleka ngemuva kwamahora akho ayi-24 okuqala ku-Zobia.
admin.aiSettings.subtitle: Manage API keys and connection status for AI providers.
admin.aiSettings.keyPlaceholder: Override API key (blank = use env var)
onboarding.step1.title: Create your identity
onboarding.step1.subtitle: Your username is permanent. Make it count.
onboarding.step1.usernameError: Please choose a valid, available username.
onboarding.step1.birthYearHint: You must be at least {{age}} years old. You can add your full date of birth in settings after joining.
onboarding.step1.birthYearInvalid: Please enter a valid year between 1900 and {{year}}.
onboarding.step1.ageError: You must be at least {{age}} years old to join Zobia.
onboarding.step2.title: Set the vibe
onboarding.step2.subtitle: 4 quick questions to personalise your experience.
onboarding.step2.q2: Are you a lone wolf or a crew person?
onboarding.step2.allRequired: Please answer all four questions to continue.
onboarding.xpDrop.title: Welcome to Zobia!
onboarding.step4.title: Find your guild
onboarding.step4.subtitle: Guilds are your crew on Zobia. Join one to unlock chat, wars, and bonuses.
onboarding.step4.noGuilds: No guilds found in your city yet. You can join one later from the Guilds tab.
onboarding.step5.title: Your first quest awaits!
onboarding.step5.subtitle: Complete quests to earn XP, credits, and unlock rewards.
onboarding.step5.findPeopleHint: Search for friends already on Zobia, or share your invite link.
onboarding.step5.searchLabel: Search by username or display name
onboarding.error.ageTooYoung: This platform requires users to be at least {{age}} years old.
onboarding.error.captchaFailed: CAPTCHA verification failed. Please try again.
onboarding.error.usernameTaken: That username is already taken. Please choose another.
onboarding.error.network: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
onboarding.error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.twoFaVerify.title: Ukuqinisekiswa Kwezinyathelo Ezimbili
auth.twoFaVerify.instructions: Faka ikhodi yamanani ayisi-6 evela ku-app yakho yokuqinisekisa ukuze uqhubeke.
auth.require2Fa.title: Ukuqinisekiswa Kwezinyathelo Ezimbili Kuyadingeka
auth.require2Fa.body: I-akhawunti yakho inegunya lomeluleki. Inqubomgomo yenkundla idinga ukuthi bonke abameluleki bavule ukuqinisekiswa kwezinyathelo ezimbili ngaphambi kokungena.
auth.featureDisabled: Lesi sici asikavunyelwa kulo mkhakha njengamanje.
friends.title: Abangane
gifts.title: Izipho
gifts.subtitle: Thumela izipho kubangane futhi ubuke umlando wakho wezipho
gifts.empty.received: Akukho zipho ezamukelwe kuze kube manje
gifts.empty.sent: Akukho zipho ezathunywa kuze kube manje
gifts.send.title: Thumela Isipho
settings.privacy.lockProfileDesc: Only friends can view your profile details
settings.privacy.lockProfilePlanRequired: Available on Pro plan and above
settings.privacy.disableFriendRequestsDe: Prevent others from sending you friend requests
settings.privacy.disableFriendRequestsPl: Available on Plus plan and above
settings.privacy.hideSectionsDesc: Choose which sections to hide from other users
messages.coinError.notEnoughCoins: Udinga amakhrediti ezingu-{{required}} ukuthumela lo mlayezo. Njengamanje une-{{balance}} amakhrediti.
settings.twoFaDisabledByAdmin: Ukuqinisekiswa kwezinyathelo ezimbili njengamanje kukhubazwe umphathi wenkundla.
settings.pinDisabledByAdmin: Ukuqinisekiswa kwe-PIN njengamanje kukhubazwe umphathi wenkundla.
